CI Recovery Surface & Enforcement RESTRICTED

PR #444 ↗ mockDebug · real device
Tap the glowing areas on screen to move through the flow

Data source
Backend dep
Design decision

What changed — additive & backend-driven, safe defaults

Capability InterventionM1

The CI Detail screen rendered empty — the GET /ci/detail/{id} fetch never existed. Added the endpoint, DTO, mapper & ViewModel so the full recovery plan populates, with an instant feed-minimal header and a neutral exit affordance.

Enforcement RESTRICTEDM2

One RESTRICTED posture, three read-only surfaces — amber banner, bonus-pause inside the Earnings Bonus section, and an amber routing taper distinct from the red SUSPENDED hard-stop. Banner routes to Quality (enablement), not a contest.
